problems.title: Can the conjecture’s central analogy from formal incompleteness to 'self-knowled
problems.summary: Can the conjecture’s central analogy from formal incompleteness to 'self-knowledge' be made precise without equivocation? The open problem is to define a non-metaphorical notion of self-knowledge, int
problems.full_text: Can the conjecture’s central analogy from formal incompleteness to 'self-knowledge' be made precise without equivocation? The open problem is to define a non-metaphorical notion of self-knowledge, internal justification, and epistemic closure for agents or knowledge-creating systems, and then determine whether a Gödel-style impossibility theorem genuinely follows rather than being imported by analogy from formal arithmetic.

problems.title: How can 'counterfactual reach' be made precise without collapsing into existing
problems.summary: How can 'counterfactual reach' be made precise without collapsing into existing notions like prediction, compression, causal modeling, or invariance? The conjecture hinges on a structural criterion, b
problems.full_text: How can 'counterfactual reach' be made precise without collapsing into existing notions like prediction, compression, causal modeling, or invariance? The conjecture hinges on a structural criterion, but it leaves open what formally counts as 'systematic deformation,' 'remaining informative,' and 'generating structure' across variations.
